top_findings.title: Data is not stored in SQLite or any embedded DB
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:37-40 uses process-global lazy_static Mutex<Vec<Book>> in-memory storage; Cargo.toml lists no DB dependency (rusqlite/sqlx/diesel); README.md states 'uses in-memory storage ... without external dependencies like a database'. All data is lost on restart.
top_findings.suggestion: Persist books in SQLite (e.g. rusqlite or sqlx with the bundled sqlite feature) so the storage requirement is met.
